narrative:
Township Bath township has 6,156 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.5 percentage points.
